title: Export to Excel - Fails or Times Out
excerpt: We are constantly having issues getting data to export to excel from our boards.  We get the green box that says, “Just a moment, we’re exporting the data for you right now”, but usually after 5 minutes, it either times …

posts.author: rcullen (Ryan Cullen)
posts.cookedHtml: We are constantly having issues getting data to export to excel from our boards. We get the green box that says, “Just a moment, we’re exporting the data for you right now”, but usually after 5 minutes, it either times out or does nothing at all. We usually have to try at least 5 times for it to export anything. Anyone else having this issue? It’s around 1700 rows of data.
